title: galeopsis × infallibilis
intro: Galeopsis × infallibilis, a rare hybrid plant, is a cross between the perennial Galeopsis angustifolia and another species within the same genus. Although not much information is available, it's reported that Galeopsis × infallibilis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. However, due to its rarity and limited research, specific herbal preparations and recommended dosages are not well-documented.
